titles.title: Community TEAMS Act of 2026
Community TEAMS Act of 2026
Community Training, Education, and Access for Medical Students Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to provide community-based training opportunities for medical students in rural areas and medically underserved communities, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
